action_instruction: Confirming the newest post at the top of the Home feed
intent: PRIMARY: wait briefly while confirming the newest (top) Home feed post is visible
rationale: The top of the Home feed already shows the newest post with an image and a '+20 points' label, so the review step is satisfied. I'll mark task step 1 complete before running the required checkpoint analyses.

action_instruction: Checking whether a new feed post is visible and includes an image element with a non-empty source.
intent: PRIMARY: is a new feed post visible and includes an image element whose source is non-empty visible/present? answer true or false | HINTS: top post card under the "Home" header with a large photo

action_params.query: PRIMARY: is a new feed post visible and includes an image element whose source is non-empty visible/present? answer true or false | HINTS: top post card under the "Home" header with a large photo

action_instruction: Checking whether the newest Home feed post shows "+20 points".
intent: PRIMARY: is the newest Home feed post showing "+20 points" visible/present? answer true or false | HINTS: top post card under the "Home" header, near the activity label "Gym"

action_params.query: PRIMARY: is the newest Home feed post showing "+20 points" visible/present? answer true or false | HINTS: top post card under the "Home" header, near the activity label "Gym"

assertion_tree.description: Verify that a new feed post appears with an image element that has a non-empty source, and that the post shows "+20 points".

sub_results.description: A new feed post is visible and includes an image element whose source is non-empty
The new feed post shows "+20 points"

action_instruction: Checking whether no error message or error overlay is shown on the Home feed screen
intent: PRIMARY: is NO error message or error overlay shown on the Home feed screen? answer true or false | HINTS: look for any red error text, toast, modal dialog, or overlay covering the feed

action_params.query: PRIMARY: is NO error message or error overlay shown on the Home feed screen? answer true or false | HINTS: look for any red error text, toast, modal dialog, or overlay covering the feed

assertion_tree.description: Verify no error message or error overlay is shown.

sub_results.description: No error message or error overlay is shown on the Home feed

action_instruction: Verifying whether a Home feed post card is visible with an image displayed.
intent: PRIMARY: a Home feed post card is visible with an image displayed | HINTS: main feed post near the top Always answer true/false, nothing else.

action_params.query: PRIMARY: a Home feed post card is visible with an image displayed | HINTS: main feed post near the top Always answer true/false, nothing else.

assertion_tree.description: On the Home feed, verify that a new feed post appears with an image element that has a non-empty source, and that the post shows "+20 points". Verify no error message or error overlay is shown.

sub_results.description: Final verification — confirm the objective is fully achieved

assertion_tree.verification: Verify task completed: On the Home feed, verify that a new feed post appears with an image element that has a non-empty source, and that the post shows "+20 points". Verify no error message or error overlay is shown.. A confirmation screen, success message, or completed state should be visible.
